ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Combobox composes an editable trigger, popup, command-style filtering, and option selection; a selection-aware clear action remains consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves the React Aria editable-combobox focus and form model while offering an optional clear compound part that resets both committed selection and editable text through controlled or uncontrolled boundaries.

visualSignature.summary: The editable control and popup use literal Canvas surfaces, precise Ink boundaries, strong labels, a Green selection signal, the shared Violet focus seam, purposeful reduced motion, and restrained control radii.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A localized native button clears the selected key and editable query, closes the popup, and disables itself when both values are empty.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Input editing, selection, popup, and form behavior follow the ordinary combobox path.
disabledBehavior.events: No clear click or clear-state callbacks can occur.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No clear control, accessible name, disabled state, or tab stop is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Native combobox/listbox semantics, virtual focus, localized naming, SSR, keyboard, touch, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and axe coverage are current; manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and mobile assistive-technology records remain missing.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers optional composition and clean removal, controlled clearing, filtering, keyboard selection, dismissal, focus return, narrow layout, RTL, preference modes, touch, target geometry, and axe.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Current desktop/mobile screen-reader, speech, switch, and relevant device evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn does not publish a standalone Listbox; Select supplies a common single-selection popup baseline, while multiple selection, measured virtualization, and retained off-window selection context remain consumer work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora combines a strict shared collection and form model with independently selectable measured virtualization and bounded selected-text context that survives filtering and off-window rendering.

visualSignature.summary: The listbox uses a literal Canvas surface, Ink row structure, strong label hierarchy, a Green selected edge/check cue, the shared Violet focus seam, purposeful reduced motion, and restrained radii.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A bounded locale-driven accessibility summary retains selected option names when selected rows are filtered or outside a virtual window.

api.enableWhen: Leave formatSelectionSummary undefined for the locale-driven default or provide a localized formatter.

disabledBehavior.ui: No hidden selected-text summary is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Summary records are not formatted; ordinary selection and virtualization continue independently.
disabledBehavior.events: The summary formatter is never called.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No summary id, node, or aria-describedby contribution is exposed.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Measured React Aria ListLayout virtualization bounds rendered rows while retaining focused-row and option-position semantics.

api.enableWhen: Pass measured item and optional section-heading estimates.

disabledBehavior.ui: All collection rows render through the ordinary non-virtualized listbox path.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No ListLayout or Virtualizer participates in collection rendering.
disabledBehavior.events: No virtualizer layout or scroll-window events occur.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No virtualization-only position, set-size, or window-retention output is added.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated listbox semantics, focus, selection, forms, summary removal, virtualization, keyboard, touch, narrow, RTL, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and axe coverage are current; manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and device records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Focused unit and Storybook browser evidence covers independent enhancement removal, selection, filtering/page retention, forms/reset, async recovery, virtualization, keyboard, touch, and preference modes.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and relevant device evidence is not yet recorded.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Select supplies an accessible single-selection trigger, popup, groups, items, and form-compatible value; measured large-collection rendering and retained off-window selection context remain consumer work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora keeps enhanced and explicit native picker presentations on one canonical collection/form model while independently offering measured virtualization and bounded selected-text context in enhanced mode.

optionalEnhancements.summary: A bounded locale-driven accessibility summary keeps the selected option represented when enhanced options are filtered or outside a virtual window.

api.enableWhen: Leave formatSelectionSummary undefined for the locale-driven default or provide a localized formatter in enhanced presentation.

disabledBehavior.ui: No hidden selected-text summary is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Summary records are not formatted; ordinary enhanced selection and optional virtualization continue independently.
disabledBehavior.events: The summary formatter is never called.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No summary id, node, or accessibility-description contribution is exposed.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Measured React Aria ListLayout virtualization bounds enhanced option rendering while preserving focused-row and option-position semantics.

api.enableWhen: Use enhanced presentation and pass measured item and optional section-heading estimates.

disabledBehavior.ui: Enhanced options render through the ordinary non-virtualized listbox path.
disabledBehavior.behavior: No ListLayout or Virtualizer participates in option rendering.
disabledBehavior.events: No virtualizer layout or scroll-window events occur.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No virtualization-only position, set-size, or window-retention output is added.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: The ordinary Shadcn Combobox baseline supports filtering and option selection but does not own native text serialization or explicit match-position context.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Optional visible and polite match context reports result count and active position without changing baseline combobox behavior.

visualSignature.summary: Literal white, ink structure, strong labels, restrained selected-state signals, bounded corners, shared focus, and forced-colors mappings keep Autocomplete in the Mergora family.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Reports filtered count and active option position.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Filtering and selection continue without context work.
disabledBehavior.events: No enhancement-only event or formatter runs.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No live region or enhancement-specific description enters the accessibility tree.

disabledBehavior.behavior: Search and execution continue without preview work.

disabledBehavior.accessibility: Region semantics are absent; modal semantics, focus containment, and restoration remain.
